howTo.title: Make a Collage Animation in 3 Steps

1.title: Upload two photos
1.description: Pick a main subject photo plus a second photo — a place, an object or another person to weave into the collage.

2.title: Pick an era & add details
2.description: Choose from 8 history themes — Ancient Dynasty, Roman Empire, Silk Road, Space Race and more. Optionally type extra details to steer the scene.

3.title: Get your stop-motion video
3.description: Our AI cuts everything into paper pieces and animates them with frame-skip flutter and sticker-bounce motion. Download as MP4 in about 2 minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about generating history collage animations.

1.question: What photos work best?
1.answer: Clear, well-lit photos with a distinct subject. Portraits, landmarks, objects and pets all work — the AI turns them into paper cutout characters.

2.question: How long is the generated video?
2.answer: Every video is 4 seconds long at 480p, in 9:16 or 16:9. The collage style is silent by design, like a stop-motion explainer.

3.question: How many credits does it cost?
3.answer: 100 credits per video. Earn free credits daily via check-in, or unlock more with a subscription.

4.question: Can I use the videos commercially?
4.answer: Yes, generated videos are yours to use. We recommend disclosing AI generation when posting to social platforms.

benefits.badge: Why People Love AI History Collage
benefits.title: Turn Any Photo Into a History Explainer
benefits.subtitle: From ancient dynasties to the space race — remix your photos into the paper-cutout documentary style made famous by Vox explainers.

1.title: Authentic paper cutout motion
1.desc: Frame-skipping, subtle paper flutter, segmented displacement and sticker-bounce — every element moves like a hand-made stop-motion collage.

2.title: Two photos, one story
2.desc: Blend a person with a place, a pet with a spaceship, or two friends across an empire map — both reference photos become cutout characters.

3.title: Steer it with your own words
3.desc: The optional detail box lets you add props, routes, captions and jokes — your text is woven straight into the animation prompt.
